query: SELECT t.token, t.lojaId, l.nome as lojaNome FROM tokens_loja t JOIN lojas l ON t.lojaId = l.id WHERE t.ativo = 1 AND t.token_loja_type = 'responsavel' LIMIT 3
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT t.token, t.lojaId, l.nome as lojaNome FROM tokens_loja t JOIN lojas l ON t.lojaId = l.id WHERE t.ativo = 1 AND t.token_loja_type = 'responsavel' LIMIT 3
